conservative.name: Vanhel's Danse Macabre
conservative.requirements:
7 Power
You must brandish a bone from the foot of a human or elf. If engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You cast the spell. Its effects extend out to close range
You cast the spell. Its effects extend out to medium range

boon.description: You or an undead creature within close range recovers 1 wound
You or an undead creature within close range may immediately perform a manoeuvre

sigmarsComet.description: You and all undead creatures within close range recover 1 wound

reckless.name: Vanhel's Danse Macabre
reckless.requirements:
7 Power
You must brandish a bone from the foot of a human or elf. If engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You cast the spell. Its effects extend to your engagement
You cast the spell. Its effects extend out to medium range
You cast the spell. Its effects extend out to long range

boon.description: You or an undead creature within close range recovers 1 wound

sigmarsComet.description: You and all undead creatures within close range recover 1 wound
